title: The Person I Couldn’t Forget
content: After graduating from college, Liam moved to another city and focused on building his career. Years passed, yet he often remembered Emma, the classmate who always encouraged him during difficult times. One afternoon, while scrolling through social media, he found a photo of her volunteering at a local library. Without thinking too much, he sent a friendly message. Emma replied almost immediately, and their conversation felt surprisingly natural. They realized that although life had taken them in different directions, some connections had never truly disappeared. Sometimes the people we cannot forget are simply waiting for us to reach out.
